programme.title: Snack Wars

programme.sub-title: The Short Happy Circuit Of Aunt Clara

programme.title: Bewitched S3E87
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Bewitched S3E88
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Class of '92: Full Time
programme.desc: After blowing a 12-point lead, Salford sit second in the league, and are in free-fall. Their chances of promotion - and the managers' positions - are under serious threat.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: A look at a champion golfer at the world's pre-eminent Major, The Open. Here, look at the achievements of Scotsman Sandy Lyle, who was victorious at Royal St George's in 1985.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Follow the remarkable golf story of Australia's Ian Baker-Finch, most famous for his surprise win at The 1991 Open Championship at Royal Birkdale.

programme.title: Gary Neville's Soccer Box
programme.desc: Gary Neville sits down with former teammate Paul Scholes to discuss their time in the game and some of the most notable matches in which they played.

programme.title: The Heirs of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The Freemasons are the secret brotherhood with the most members. More than four million followers regularly gather in their temples and lodges. Their fundamental ideals are liberty, equality, fraternity, tolerance and humanity. It is because of their rituals, some of them bizarre, and their self-imposed secrecy that there are still conspiracy theories about this secret order.

programme.title: The Pamir Highway
programme.desc: The Central Asian Pamir Highway has many surprises in store for its travellers. Our journey will take us some 1,300 kilometres, beginning in Tajikistan, then down the River Panj along the border with Afghanistan and on to Kyrgyzstan.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Food: Human life today would be very different if our ancestors had not stopped hunting animal protein. In the Fertile Crescent - known today as the Middle East - humans travelled in nomadic groups of hunter-gatherers and ate what they killed.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Covering: When our ancestors saw how other animals kept warm in sub-freezing temperatures, they started hunting them for their hides and fur. As hominid evolution was diverging from other primates, they lost their thick covering of fur when the mercury dropped.

programme.title: Born to Fly
programme.desc: We envy birds, watching them enjoy the freedom of a 3 dimensional space. Flight allows them to get to hard to reach places and preform aerial acrobatics in protecting home ranges and searching for food.

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Asia: China and India are the world's two most populous countries. They are also burdened with two of the most famous ‘hot' deserts - the Gobi desert in Mongolia-China and the Thar desert in India-Pakistan. Most people do not think of China as a desert nation - and yet it is among the world's largest. A staggering third of China's land area, 2.5 million square kilometres, is useless sand.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: Robotics
programme.desc: New technological allies could prove indispensable. Robots: mimicking human senses, detecting threats without being spotted.

programme.title: Digital Data
programme.desc: With the advent of digital media and the internet, the global war on terrorism has changed. Extremist groups use these new tools to strike fear.

programme.title: Soldier of the Future
programme.desc: The units charged with neutralizing the terrorists have had to update their engagement tactics. To help these units, scientists and researchers to develop new equipment.

programme.title: Going Circular
programme.desc: Explore the secrets to an innovative concept called circularity -- an economic system that eliminates waste and saves the planet's resources.

programme.title: Connecting To The Future
programme.desc: Host Derek Muller escorts us to the physical heart of the Internet, and demonstrates how Internet co-creators Vint Cerf and Bob Kahn devised a language.

programme.title: Man Vs. Machine
programme.desc: We peer inside "The Internet of Things" and reveal how web advertising, search engines and 24/7 surveillance have transformed our lives.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Web
programme.desc: Muller introduces viewers to "white" hackers, the U.S. Secret Service's cybercrime division including West Point soldiers working to protect us from the Web.

programme.title: The Woman Who Loves Giraffes
programme.desc: Dr. Anne Innis Dagg re-traces the steps of her ground-breaking 1956 journey to South Africa to study giraffes in the wild. Now, at 85 years old, Anne sees a startling contrast between the world of giraffes she once knew and the one it has become. Weaving through the past and present, her harrowing journey gives us an intimate look into the factors that destroyed her career and the forces that brought her back.

programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter
programme.desc: Most of the life of an otter goes unseen following a young otter family we'll reveal the secrets of the otter's world.

programme.title: Wild Waters
programme.desc: From the highest mountain to the lowest valley, rivers and streams are freshwater highways, de-livering essential life blood to all kinds of wildlife. From some of the most iconic species like the otter and the trout, to the unfamiliar and elusive, like the delicate harvest mouse. Life on these freshwater freeways can be tough, and for many it's a constant battle just to stay alive. Take a break from the oceans and turn to the rivers and streams, home to the real wild waters of the nat-ural world.

programme.title: Wolves
programme.desc: Wolves: icons of the wilderness, spectacular creatures that live and die by the sword.

programme.title: The Return of the Osprey
programme.desc: The Osprey is the only raptor in the world to feed exclusively on fish. This migratory bird has lived throughout central Europe for a long time, nesting there in the summer months. But the species has gradually moved to more northerly regions of the continent, far from the persecution caused by human expansion. Wendy and Denis have set launched an ambitious challenge of reintroducing the Osprey to Switzerland, a century after its disappearance.

programme.title: The Woman Who Loves Giraffes
programme.desc: Dr. Anne Innis Dagg re-traces the steps of her ground-breaking 1956 journey to South Africa to study giraffes in the wild. programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter
programme.desc: Most of the life of an otter goes unseen following a young otter family we'll reveal the secrets of the otter's world.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Far from the glamour and spotlight of Lampedusa, Pantelleria is one of the best kept secrets among the Italian islands. Located closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria has been nicknamed "The Last Island," a title also given by Giosuè Calaciura gave to his 2016 historical novel set on Pantelleria. Pantelleria, that is the island of lava, capers and of the liqueur wine that comes here Zibibbo. An island with an ancient history, where for centuries farmers and fishermen have pursued their craft. their craft. The famous Zibibbo grapes are cultivated here - among other things also on the vineyard that Gerard Depardieu and his wife Carole Bouquet bought to produce traditional liqueur and nutmeg wine themselves and distribute it worldwide. The cuisine of the island is as much Arabic as Italian, couscous with fish is a typical island dish.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Venice has been attracting people as if by magic for centuries. The Italians call her La Serenissima, or the sublime. Perched on wooden posts, she braves the elements and the huge, annual surge of visitors. Vogalonga is the name of a Venetian sports competition for women, in which the participants row their boats standing. This is a tradition that Guilia and Elena also follow. They train hard, as the yearly regatta is soon to begin. Anyone caught driving their water vehicle with more than 7 km/h through the canals of Venice, risks getting a ticket from local policewoman Lorenza Mariutti. The reason: the resulting waves gnaw at the foundations of the grand palaces. Venetians are very attached to their traditional cuisine. The island of Sant' Erasmo is the town's garden. Artichokes, radicchio, onions, everything that grows here is said to taste fantastic, thanks to the salt content of the air and water. Carlo and Claudio Finotello not only grow the vegetables, they even deliver directly to their customers' doors. At sunset, they sail through the lagoon with their boat, brimming with produce, towards San Marco. People waiting at the many bridges, now receive their wares: regional, seasonal, fresh. And without a hint of stress if possible. Like so many other things in Venice. Perhaps because La Serenissima is also known as "The Composed".

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians themselves say it's a "continent for itself", a virtual world of its own, full of magic: A beach, gleaming in unreal pink shades, red corals protect against the evil eye and the inhabitants seem to remain forever young. On Sardinia, the owners of luxury yachts adopt sheep, fish have gold in their bellies and a giant mussel supplies the material for legendary sea silk. No one is surprised, that the Madonna goes on a sea cruise once a year.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Capri was already in ancient times a place for the rich and beautiful. Today Capri is one of the most famous islands in the world. Millions of tourists visit it. But there are in fact still unknown corners on the island in the Gulf of Naples. Thus, at the very top of Capri, there is a hermit monastery with a view to the Vesuvius.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: The Provence coast
programme.desc: The Provence is famed for its endless fields of laven-der, but this lush landscape also has a beautifully mari-time touch: The Côte Bleue! Small, hidden beaches, charming harbour towns, imposing, craggy bays and a uniquely clear light that has attracted painters includ-ing Cézanne and Braque. The coast derives its name from the deep blue water and extends from Marseille to Martigues. This small town is also known as "The Ven-ice of the North", as it is shaped entirely by water: an inland lake, the sea itself, as well as a connecting canal. In the bays of the Calanques, the steeply-walled coastal inlets in the Mediterranean limestone, Lionel Franc is a cliff diver. His personal record is a hight of 36 metres! Ambi is a sculptress. This young artist's work, who moved to Marseille from Madagascar many years ago, is characterised by a dynamic momentum. As a pas-sionate pétanque player, she demonstrates this drive on the boules courts of the port city. John Pendray is Pein-tre officiel de la Marine, an official marine painter. The French state allows just 40 painters to its circle. There are no monetary rewards, but heaps of honour and a very smart uniform!

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: "Cleaning woman island", concrete castles, Ballermann: Mallorca's image is negatively affected in some respects. The documentary explores the charm of the largest Balearic island beyond the hustle and bustle of tourism and Rambazamba. The "real" Mallorca is best explored through real Majorcans: Manolo Barahona, TV fishing expert from the local island broadcaster IB3, faces the most difficult task of the year. The Raor is in season, the most expensive fish on the island. Manolo is supposed to get him first in front of the camera and then in the pan. There's only one catch, the little fish with the piranha teeth just doesn't want to be on TV. In the first months of the year Mallorca turns into a sea of almond blossoms. There are around seven million almond trees on the island, once planted to replace dead vines. But now also the almond trees are threatened. The fire bacterium continues to spread, especially on the large plantations. The farmer Biel Torrens wants to save Mallorca's almond trees and fruit with a small organic plantation and gentle harvesting methods. He shakes the almonds from the tree by hand instead of using a mechanical vibrator.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The light of the Balearic island of Ibiza is magical and its trademark: The "Island of Light" is tiny compared to its sister island Mallorca, but offers the most beautiful sunsets in the world. That's what they say. They attract sun worshippers and party people from near and far. To the sounds of the famous "Balearic Sound" they turn night into day. This documentary documents the island in the balancing act between luxury yachts and traditions. Hippie culture, celebrities, pine forests, bays with turquoise water and villages with bright white houses: Ibiza has many faces. Mora (80) and Djin (67) have been drawn to the island for 55 years. They are the uncrowned kings of the hippies. But only love, light, air and laziness, these times are also long gone on Ibiza. Mora knits sexy jerseys for young hippies from morning till night. Djin helps her sell at the famous Las Dalias hippie market and works as a construction worker: chilling and no pension in sight. The virgin Carmen is the patron saint of the sailors. On her day of honour, a mass is celebrated in the port city of Eivissa. Afterwards, fishermen carry the Virgin through the narrow streets of Ibiza City down to the quay. And then Carmen sets sail. Several places on Ibiza claim to offer the most beautiful sunset in the world: In front of Cala de Benirrás, the sun sinks right next to the iconic rock Cap Benat, which the locals awefully call "God's Finger". The typical soft beats over the sea sound from almost all the bays and provide deep relaxation worldwide under the term "Balearic Sound". Some of the famous DJs are jetting around the globe for huge fees. But in the small beach bars, the Chiringuitos, the island sound is celebrated further. On the beach of Cala Salada the Brit Joe Burnley has the command over a troop of mermaids. The ladies squeeze into the tight mermaid costume for the good cause. With great grace they swim towards yachts that are forbidden to anchor on sea grass meadows. Charming but unyielding, they point out the offence to the captain and crew a creative environmental action to save the endangered Neptune gas, green lung of the sea and habitat for Ibiza's seahorses. The underwater photographer Manu San Felix is also committed to the endangered seahorses. Using a probe, he maps the coastal area around Ibiza and feeds the data into a GPS app. No skipper should be able to say that he didn't even know that his anchor was clawing into Neptune grass. On land, Manu is dedicated to breeding seahorses. His plan: He wants to expose the animals in the Mediterranean to Ibiza and Formentera in order to secure their population. Garages on the beach? Many bays on the island still have Casetas Varadero, boat garages threatened with decay. Fishermen once built them illegally. The picturesque sheds are therefore only tolerated, but may no longer be restored. The 83-year-old Toni Salvado still drives straight out to sea from his garage. programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Sevens
programme.desc: When the Goha Gazette slams Rush Duels, will this new way to duel become yesterday's news?

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Springtime: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfic Games: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Pussywillow Pixies: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Stuff Dreams Are Smurfed Of
programme.desc: Gargamel has devised a new plan whereby he can annihilate the Smurfs: he is now going to influence their dreams! Luckily, Papa Smurf has heard about the magical Gold Crown of Dreams...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf Me No Flowers: Poor Lazy Smurf cannot sleep any more. He believes he is living his last moments and sets out to do all the exciting things he was always too sleepy to do before...

programme.title: The Kaplowey Scroll
programme.desc: There is a terrifying magic word. When you direct the word at something or someone, you make it vanish into nothingness! Can the Smurfs undo its evil power before Gargamel gets hold of it?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Box Of Dirty Tricks: What is in this curious box that the Smurfs found on the riverbank? If they knew, the Smurfs would not dream of opening it. And they would avoid Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: Sleepwalking Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel feels sure he has found the final solution to the vexing Smurf question. His magic flute is going to turn their peaceful slumber into a nightmare...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bubble, Bubble, Smurfs In Trouble: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: Foul Weather Smurf
programme.desc: Handy invents a weather machine that will allow the Smurfs to control their environment at will. Unfortunately, they cannot agree on whether it should rain or be sunny so the machine overloads and explodes.

programme.title: Spelunking Smurfs
programme.desc: The starving Smurfs discover a cave that has a stash of frozen food inside guarded by an equally frozen troll who was imprisoned because of his greed by a magic diamond. As the Smurfs defrost the cave, Gargamel steals the food, but the magic diamond transforms him into an icy mass and the freed troll happily helps the Smurfs carry the food back to their village.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Magic Stick
programme.desc: With a borrowed recipe from Homnibus, Papa Smurf creates a magic stick that Clumsy takes and loses in the woods. Soon after, Bigmouth comes for a visit and before he eats all the smurfberries, Papa Smurf finds the magic stick and whisks the giant away.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Born Rotten: As the Smurfs prepare for the Festival of the Stars, Gargamel plants a creature in their midst that smells so rotten that he can easily be traced to the Smurf village. Papa Smurf realizes that Born Rotten is from another planet, and he instructs Feathers to return him to his home before Gargamel finds them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Christmas: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: Rabbids are in the wild.
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid gives a Rabbid butler a old pictures of himself, frozen inside an ice cube.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.

programme.desc: An Explorer Rabbid heads off to the Ice floe in search of treasure.

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.
programme.desc: A Rabbid walks down the street when he steps on some chewing gum.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: In order to free Sketch Lampoon (a satirical comic book artist) from Robotnik's new high security prison, Sonic allows himself to be captured, then makes a high speed rescue and escape.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: Ball Pool
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to play inside the local play area, but he is not allowed to enter.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: Itsy (Emma Tremblay) is the new girl in a small town, with dreams of returning to the big city to pursue her dream career as a journalist.

programme.title: Sea Level
programme.desc: Pup, a bamboo shark, discovers egg sacs while playing around the ocean with his friends. When he sees human poachers stealing the eggs from his reef, Pup makes it his mission to save his family.

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Wonderwell
programme.desc: A coming-of-age fairy-tale set between modern-day Italy and the fantastical realm just beyond, Wonderwell follows Violet, a naive and inquisitive 12-year-old girl, on a thrilling adventure that transforms her life forever.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: The Love Punch
programme.desc: THE LOVE PUNCH brings together Pierce Brosnan and Emma Thompson for the first time, as ex-husband and wife Richard and Kate whose biting banter suggests that the flames of their former relationship have not been fully extinguished…

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Josephine Chesterfield (Anne Hathaway) is a glamorous, seductive Brit with a penchant for defrauding gullible wealthy men. Into her well-ordered world bursts Penny Rust (Rebel Wilson), an Aussie who is as free-form and fun-loving as Josephine is calculated and cunning.

programme.title: Crash Pad
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic (Domhnall Gleeson) thinks he's found true love with an older woman (Christina Applegate) only to learn that she's married and their encounter was merely an instrument of revenge against her neglectful husband (Thomas Haden Church). Initially out for blood...

programme.title: Super Eruption
programme.desc: (2011) Explosive sci-fi with Richard Burgi. When the dormant supervolcano under Yellowstone National Park erupts, millions of lives are at risk. Can Rangers Charlie and Kate save the day?

programme.title: End Of The World
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi comedy with Heroes star Greg Grunberg. When catastrophic events strike, two video shop employees with an encyclopaedic knowledge of disaster films become humanity's unlikely heroes.

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: (2011) Red-hot action adventure with Rachel Hunter. Can a volcano expert blow the whistle on an illegal oil drilling operation before it sets off a city-destroying super-volcano beneath Miami?

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: (2015) Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster?

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Mecha Shark
programme.desc: (2014) Third entry in the monstrous disaster flick series, starring Christopher Judge. A supersized, shark-shaped sub is dispatched to kill the giant shark that has been terrorising the world.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston).

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: Don Champage is a successful businessman who seems to have it all--including an obsessive wife who relentlessly controls everything in his life

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: In 1904 an earthquake of magnitude 5.4 on the Richter scale shook Oslo, with an epicenter in the Oslo Graben which runs under the Norwegian capital. Today, a geologist races against time to save his estranged wife and two children when a devastating earthquake of 5.3 magnitude threatens to strike Oslo, Norway again.

programme.title: Mythica 4
programme.desc: Good and evil battle it out in the fourth gripping adventure from the fantastical franchise. When daring young wizard Marek steals the final piece of the all-powerful Darkspore she embarks on a desperate quest to deliver the cursed artefact to the gods.

programme.title: Decoding Annie Parker
programme.desc: Love, science, sex, infidelity, disease and comedy, the wild, mostly true story of the irrepressible Annie Parker and the almost discovery of a cure for cancer

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Open Water: Open Water
programme.desc: When a couple is stranded while scuba diving, they soon realize they are in the middle of shark-infested waters in this intense, critically acclaimed thriller.

programme.desc: A feature about the Granite Mountain Hotshots firefighter crew that perished in a wildfire in Prescott, AZ.

programme.desc: A former DEA agent moves his family to a quiet town, where he soon tangles with a local meth druglord.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Mercenaries
programme.desc: Andy Marlow is an S.A.S serviceman turned mercenary working covertly in the Balkans. During political unrest, Olodan Cracovic, the ex-commander of the Croat Army and wanted war criminal, and his army raid the U.S. Embassy, taking the U.S Ambassador captive. The decision is taken to send in mercenaries to carry out the rescue. Sent under the cover of darkness, the Mercenaries infiltrate Olodan\s headquarters, taking him captive and freeing the Ambassador. However, the rescue is far from over. Faced with transporting them to a safe area and with Olodan\s right hand man in pursuit, the team find themselves outnumbered, outgunned and fighting what could easily be a losing battle.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts (Dennis Quaid, Vantage Point and Ben Foster, 30 Days of Night) awaken in a hyper-sleep chamber aboard a seemingly abandoned spacecraft. It's pitch black, they are disoriented, and the only sound is a low rumble and creak from the belly of the ship. They can't remember anything like who they are and what their mission is, but one thing they do realise very quickly is that they are not alone. Slowly the spacecraft's shocking, deadly secrets are revealed and the astronauts find that they must fight to stay alive and that their survival is more important than they could ever have imagined. Directed by Christian Alvart and also starring Cam Gigandet (Twilight), Cung Le (Tekken) and newcomer Antje Traue.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: Heart-warming and hilarious, this family tale stars Academy Award nominee Clive Owen (Children of Men) and Maria Bello (A History of Violence). Walt, a down-on-his luck carpenter, is tasked with entertaining his eight-year-old son Anthony. But when Walt's prized toolbox is stolen, a quiet father-and-son weekend turns into an adventure of a lifetime. This sincere story of fatherhood is a must see!

programme.title: Eloise
programme.desc: From the producers of The Exorcism of Emily Rose. Four friends break into an abandoned insane asylum to find a death certificate that could land them a hefty inheritance. While inside they discover the shocking history of the asylum and the terrifying truth about their own pasts. A haunting horror starring Chace Crawford (Gossip Girl) and Eliza Dushku (Bring it On).

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: Described as ÒThe Wolf of Wall Street on WaterÓ, this high-octane thriller is based on the true story of a speedboat racing multimillionaire, played by John Travolta (Gotti) whose secret life lands him in deep water. From the team behind The Iceman, the film also stars Katheryn Winnick (Vikings), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Matthew Modine (Stranger Things). Strap yourselves in for a wild ride!

programme.title: Discarnate
programme.desc: The producer of Independence Day: Resurgence brings you this spine-tingling descent into the supernatural. A grieving neuro-scientist creates a mind-altering serum that reconnects people to the other side. However it unknowingly attracts a more sinister being. This mind-bending horror stars Thomas Kretschmann (King Kong) Josh Stewart (Interstellar) and Bex Taylor-Klaus (TVs Scream).

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. While back in her hometown to finish her book, a novelist helps her ex save the town's historic ballroom - but can she write her own happy ending?

programme.title: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: (2020) Romance starring Taylor Cole. A professional matchmaker is tasked with matchmaking a perpetually single man to boost her company's profile. Could the perfect match be right in front of them?

programme.title: Charm of Love
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Katrina Norman. An art historian searching for an ancient relic meets a hotelier who helps her explore the area. As sparks fly between them, will she continue to bury her feelings?

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Kelly Van der Burg. A designer with no head for business meets a charming entrepreneur with no sense of style. Aren't they lucky that love, like a good outfit, is always in vogue?

programme.title: A Week in Paradise
programme.desc: A film star with a newly broken heart jets off to paradise in the Caribbean, where she finds not only herself again, but maybe even a new love.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Redeeming Love
programme.desc: Sold into prostitution as a child, Angel knows nothing but betrayal. Can her heart ever be mended? Based upon the novel by Francine Rivers.

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Holiday in The Hamptons
programme.desc: A woman inherits her grandfather's home in the Hamptons and reconnects with her childhood love.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: A month before their wedding, on Christmas Day, Emily is called away for business. When Emily is due to return, a major storm hits making it impossible for her to leave. Emily desperately tries to make it home while Ben gets his act together.

programme.title: Christmas Together
programme.desc: A woman leaves New York for LA after a break-up and falls in love while renting the guest house of a young father.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Calling For Love
programme.desc: Podcaster Sam Sanders is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Even though Love is the last thing on her mind, Samantha falls for charming Jake who calls in with a problem. Will Samantha follow her heart this time?

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: My Daughter's Secret
programme.desc: Single mother Denise struggles with her 17-year-old daughter Justine's behavior.

programme.title: My Daughter Must Live
programme.desc: Meghan learns her husband isn't her daughter's father while seeking a liver donor.

programme.title: A Daughter's Conviction [aka A Mother Behind Bars]
programme.desc: Joanne "Jo" Avery is estranged from her mother, accused of murdering her husband.

programme.title: Teens Gone Wild
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: My Daughter's Secret
programme.desc: Single mother Denise struggles with her 17-year-old daughter Justine's behavior.

programme.title: Seduced by Lies
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman is relieved to move on from her obsessive ex when she meets a handsome oil heir. However, romance gives way to suspicion when she discovers someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Cheer for Your Life
programme.desc: A high schooler faces a brutal cheer initiation. When things turn deadly and she disappears, her mom must act.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: A couple is threatened when Jessica, the driver from their past accident, moves in next door seeking revenge.

programme.title: Fbi: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Fbi: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: The Godless Ones
programme.desc: An outlaw and a bounty hunter are searching for Mexican bandit Corbancho, who is running the El Paso area, and has also robbed the Bank of Tuscon of $400,000.

programme.title: Three Ruthless Ones
programme.desc: The Walker brothers - one a criminal, another a U.S. Marshal, and the third a wealthy rancher - share a lifelong goal: to avenge their father's murder, witnessed as children. When they finally track down the killer, their clashing ideals lead to a dramatic and inevitable showdown, testing family bonds and justice itself.

programme.title: Shango
programme.desc: Shango is a Texas Ranger who finds himself up against a former Confederate officer and his gang of thugs who have been terrorizing a local border town in search of gold.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp S01E25-28
programme.desc: In one of television's first adult Westerns, the famous marshal puts his life on the line to maintain order, first in Dodge City, Kan., then in Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Comedy. Medical student Simon Sparrow deals with the issues of working in a hospital.

programme.title: Doctor at Sea
programme.desc: Simon sets off for the sea aboard a steamship where he encounters eccentric characters.

programme.title: Doctor in Love
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot Spratt gives his medical students a slating to remember over a patient. The patient is Dr Richard Hare, a student who has fallen ill with jaundice and, in love with the enticing Night Nurse!

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A riotous comedy about a group of music students who live in fear of conductor Sir Benjamin Boyd, a tyrant of a master who attempts to prevent the lads from indulging in any 'extra-curricular' activity. When part of the scholarship is to conduct a full orchestra, all imaginable hell is let loose!

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Edge of War
programme.desc: A series of incidents around the world lead to greater conflict, placing the superpowers at one another's throats. Armies march, bombs rain down, soldiers storm the beaches. One family is caught up in the conflict, can they survive as total war is declared and nuclear weapons are unleashed?

programme.title: The Zero Theorem
programme.desc: A computer hacker's goal to discover the reason for human existence continually finds his work interrupted thanks to the Management this time, they send a teenager and lusty love interest to distract him.

programme.title: The Call Up
programme.desc: When elite online gamers receive a mysterious invitation to trial a state-of-the-art virtual reality video game, they soon realise it is no game.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: (2018) Murder mystery with singer Jewel. Renovation takes a deadly twist when the body of a local banker is found in an old Victorian building Shannon is working on. It's time for some DIY sleuthing!

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: Ships In The Night
programme.desc: (2020) Crime mystery with Jesse Metcalfe. When a gallery robbery leads to murder, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson and his old flame Dr Zee Madeiras catch a killer with an eye for the perfect crime?

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: (2011) Stylish crime drama with Ryan Gosling. A stoic stuntman moonlighting as a getaway driver helps his beautiful neighbour's husband with a heist, triggering a high-speed descent into danger.

programme.title: Extraction
programme.desc: (2015) Action thriller with Bruce Willis. When a covert op goes sideways and a CIA agent is captured by the Russians, his rookie son must rescue him and prove that family ties leave no loose ends.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin: Kao Chiu Loses His Heart
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: In a world ravaged by a virus infection, turning its victims into the Undead, Alice (Jovovich), continues on her journey to find survivors and lead them to safety. Her deadly battle with the Umbrella Corporation reaches new heights, but Alice gets some unexpected help from an old friend. A new lead that promises a safe haven from the Undead takes them to Los Angeles, but when they arrive the city is overrun by thousands of Undead - and Alice and her comrades are about to step into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Residen Evil: Retribution
programme.desc: Alice fights alongside a resistance movement to regain her freedom from an Umbrella Corporation testing facility. A sequel to Resident Evil: Afterlife 3D.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: Previously featured at the London Film Festival. A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events leads him to decide if there is meaning to life after the death of his partner,Jim.

programme.title: Professor Marston & The Wonder Women
programme.desc: PROFESSOR MARSTON & THE WONDER WOMEN is based on the extraordinary true story of the creator of one of the most iconic super heroes ever conceived, and the seductive secret life he kept from his fans.

programme.title: The Big Short
programme.desc: When the banks committed the greatest fraud in US history, four outsiders risked it all to take them down. Based on the unbelievable true story and best-selling book from the author of The Blind Side and Moneyball, critics are calling The Big Short “brilliant and explosive”...

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: Never Back Down 3
programme.desc: Picking up after the events of Never Back Down 2, former MMA champion Case Walker is on the comeback trail to become champion once again.
